name: TimelineFeed
description: An activity timeline showing chronological events with icons, timestamps, and details. Ideal for event logs, audit trails, and activity feeds.

visual.description: Vertical timeline with a connecting line. Each event has a colored dot, timestamp, title, description, and optional actor avatar. Events grouped by date.
visual.layout: date headers + vertical timeline with event cards

props.name: events
props.description: Array of event objects with id, title, description, timestamp, type, actor
